shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.footer: Press ? anywhere to reopen this list.

metadata.description: One for All — an open-source, self-hosted digital workforce platform

welcome.subtitle: Talk to your chief digital employee and stand up a team that writes code, queries data, and ships messages — no workflows, no forms, no enum fields.
welcome.highlightsHeading: AI apps as a platform — not yet another agent demo.

h1.title: Conversation is the operation
h1.body: Managing a team collapses into chatting with one agent. It designs employees, dispatches tasks, and reads telemetry for you.
h1.b2: Delegate complex tasks in one sentence
h1.b3: Interrupt and add context any time

h2.title: Employees / Skills / Tools are first-class
h2.body: Unified ReAct runner · no mode field · adding a role = adding a Skill / Tool, not a database enum.

h3.title: Safe by default · end-to-end traced
h3.body: WRITE-level tools wire through a Confirmation Gate · every step lands in a trace · resumes across restarts.

welcome.ctaHeading: Ready to stand up your first team?
welcome.ctaBody: Next: tell the Lead Agent “hire me an X.” Take it from there.

replay.title: Click to replay the origami animation

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Preferences and workspace config · theme toggle is top-right · find models / providers under "Model Gateway"
settings.languageDescription: Choose the interface language; takes effect immediately.
settings.autoTitleDescription: When on, the default model summarizes your first message into a short title; when off, the literal first message is truncated (max 40 chars).
settings.footnote: More preferences (timezone, keybinding overrides, AP long-loop budgets, etc.) coming soon. The sun / moon toggle in the top-right still controls themes.

storage.title: Storage paths
storage.subtitle: Where the runtime puts files on disk · change via .env then restart the backend · live migration ships with the desktop wrapper.
storage.copyTitle: Copy the absolute path to clipboard
storage.openTitle: Reveal in file manager (desktop shell only · falls back to copy in the browser)
storage.footnote: Overrides: set ALLHANDS_DATA_DIR / ALLHANDS_SKILLS_DIR / ALLHANDS_ARTIFACTS_DIR in .env, restart the backend, and migrate existing files manually with mv.

providers.title: Providers
providers.description: Manage LLM provider credentials, base URLs, and enable flags.

models.title: Models
models.description: Model catalog, defaults, usage caps, and fallback chains.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.description: Register, connect, and sync external tool servers.

notifications.title: Notification Channels
notifications.description: Slack, email, webhooks, and other delivery channels.

workspaces.title: Local Workspaces
workspaces.description: Host directories the ExpertProgrammer (and other agents) can read / write.

workspaces.title: Local Workspaces
workspaces.subtitle: Configure host directories the ExpertProgrammer (and other agents) can read / write / shell into.
workspaces.confirmDelete: Delete this workspace? Files on disk are not touched — the platform just stops accessing them.
workspaces.footnote: Workspaces are the boundary of the local-files skill — only paths that resolve inside these roots are reachable. Symlink escape is rejected.
workspaces.emptyDescription: Add a local directory and any agent with the local-files skill can read/write code in it.
workspaces.rootPathLabel: Root path (absolute · must be an existing directory)
workspaces.rootPathHint: Cannot be / or your HOME root. Symlinks are resolved.
workspaces.readOnlyLabel: Read-only (agents cannot write or run commands)

errors.notFoundBody: There's no page at this address.
